title: Yinzvite
description: A small 'party' invite app where users can make a form online to keep track of guests. It's very Pittsburgh themed, but can be used for any party.
highlights: Utilizes Vue 3, Nuxt 3, Pinia, and Nuxt UI
Create invites, add guests, and track guest responses
Feature-Sliced Design layers with domain logic modeled DDD-style as plain TypeScript entities
